directive.title: Mobile Responsive — Charts and Data Visualizations

auditor.summary: The build implements the core ChartWrapper infrastructure and modifies 4 of 14 required dashboard pages. However, it has critical issues: (1) incomplete coverage - only 4/14 pages modified due to truncation; (2) KPI component prop mismatch will cause TypeScript/runtime errors; (3) dynamic Tailwind class will be purged; (4) TouchTargetWrapper approach is architecturally incorrect for Recharts tooltips; (5) no test infrastructure created. The build is fundamentally incomplete and cannot pass without addressing the missing pages and critical TypeScript errors. Score is capped at 40 due to incomplete implementation and critical bugs.

top_issues.description: KPI component usage has wrong props. The actual KPI component (components/ui/KPI.tsx) expects { label, value, sub, badge, accent } but the generated code uses { title, change, trend }. This will cause TypeScript errors and runtime failures.

Build was truncated at max_tokens - only 4 of 14 dashboard pages were modified. The directive requires ALL 14 dashboard pages to use ChartWrapper. Missing pages: audit-trail, automation, incentive-radar, log-response, risk, send-rfq, settings, supplier-network, threat-radar, and the root dashboard page.
Dynamic Tailwind class `min-h-[${mobileHeight}px]` will be purged by Tailwind's JIT compiler since the value is dynamic. This breaks the min-height enforcement on mobile.
